steps.title: Identify the central logic
steps.content: The passage explains that because ecosystems cross the border, one side's actions affect the other, making international cooperation essential.

steps.title: Match the word to the logic
steps.content:
”Requires” means coordination is mandatory when one side's actions affect the other—not optional, not just recommended. The other three describe unrelated concepts: evaluation (“praises”), documentation (“reports”), and suggestion (“advises”).
This matches choice A — A is correct.
